oai_dc:dc.dc:title: Deadstock, now what? An algorithmic approach to postmortem examination
oai_dc:dc.dc:creator: Helgert, Nathan
oai_dc:dc.dc:subject: autopsy
gross lesions
necropsy
postmortem examination
oai_dc:dc.dc:description: “If you have livestock, you will also have deadstock” is a com­mon refrain. How can we use this resource to provide the best service possible for our clients? This lecture will focus on a practical approach to postmortem examination of small rumi­nants through discussion of common diseases and diagnostic challenges. In addition to a review of postmortem findings, a systems-based approach to sample collection and ancillary test­ing will be discussed. Participants will be better equipped to recognize multiple common disease entities, devise diagnostic plans based upon gross lesions, and improve herd productivity.
oai_dc:dc.dc:source: American Association of Bovine Practitioners Conference Proceedings; Vol. 58 No. 2 (2025): 2025 AABP Annual Conference Proceedings; 204-209
oai_dc:dc.dc:rights: Copyright (c) 2026 American Association of Bovine Practitioners
